title: Rejuvenating Venezuelan Tomato Bowl
description: A vegan bowl that blends sweet tomatoes, black beans, tofu, and a herbal Korean namul seasoning, finished with fresh cilantro and lime for a comforting Latin fusion.
instructions: Heat olive oil in a skillet over medium heat until shimmering.
Cook cubed tofu in the skillet until golden brown on all sides, about five minutes.
Add cherry tomatoes to the skillet and sauté until they start to soften, about three minutes.
Stir in cooked black beans and Korean namul seasoning, cooking until the mixture is heated through, about two minutes.
Transfer the warm mixture to a bowl, then fold in sliced avocado and chopped cilantro.
Squeeze fresh lime juice over the bowl and give a gentle toss to combine flavors.
Adjust seasoning with salt or extra namul seasoning if desired.
Serve immediately for a fresh, comforting bowl.
